ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "menopause_status" INTEGER /* Menopause status (0 - premenopausal, 1 - peri-menopausal, 2 - post-menopausal) */,
  "tumor_size" INTEGER /* Size of the tumor (0 - 0-4mm, 1 - 5-9mm, 2 - 10-14mm, 3 - 15-19mm, 4 - 20-24mm, 5 - 25-29mm, 6 - 30-34mm, 7 - 35-39mm, 8 - 40-44mm, 9 - 45-49mm, 10 - 50-54mm, 11 - 55-59mm) */,
  "inv_nodes" INTEGER /* Number of involved nodes */,
  "node_caps" INTEGER /* Presence of node caps (0 - no, 1 - yes) */,
  "deg_malig" INTEGER /* Degree of malignancy (0 - low, 1 - medium, 2 - high) */,
  "breast" INTEGER /* Side of the breast affected (0 - left, 1 - right) */,
  "breast_quad" INTEGER /* Quadrant of the breast affected (0 - central, 1 - upper-outer, 2 - lower-outer, 3 - upper-inner, 4 - lower-inner) */,
  "irradiat" INTEGER /* Irradiation treatment (0 - no, 1 - yes) */,
  "class" INTEGER /* Class (0 - no recurrence, 1 - recurrence) */,
  "patient_name" TEXT /* Full name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Residential address of the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Detailed medical history of the patient */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date of diagnosis */,
  "last_follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date of the last follow-up */,
  "treatment_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the treatment started */,
  "treatment_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the treatment ended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_breast FOREIGN KEY ("breast") REFERENCES breast_sides ("side_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_menopause_status FOREIGN KEY ("menopause_status") REFERENCES menopause ("menopause_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_node_caps FOREIGN KEY ("node_caps") REFERENCES node_caps ("node_caps_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_irradiat FOREIGN KEY ("irradiat") REFERENCES irradiation ("irradiat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_class FOREIGN KEY ("class") REFERENCES outcome_classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_inv_nodes FOREIGN KEY ("inv_nodes") REFERENCES nodal_involvement ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_breast_quad FOREIGN KEY ("breast_quad") REFERENCES breast_quadrants ("quad_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_deg_malig FOREIGN KEY ("deg_malig") REFERENCES malignancy_degrees ("deg_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_tumor_size FOREIGN KEY ("tumor_size") REFERENCES tumor_sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "menopause" (
  "menopause_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each menopause status */,
  "menopause_name" TEXT /* Name of the menopause status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the menopause status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("menopause_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tumor_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tumor size category */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the tumor size category */,
  "size_range" TEXT /* Range of tumor size in millimeters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nodal_involvement" (
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nodal involvement category */,
  "node_count" INTEGER /* Number of involved nodes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "node_caps" (
  "node_caps_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each node caps presence status */,
  "node_caps_name" TEXT /* Name of the node caps presence status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the node caps presence status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_caps_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "malignancy_degrees" (
  "deg_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each malignancy degree category */,
  "deg_name" TEXT /* Name of the malignancy degree category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the malignancy degree category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deg_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "breast_sides" (
  "side_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each breast side */,
  "side_name" TEXT /* Name of the breast side */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the breast side */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("side_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "breast_quadrants" (
  "quad_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each breast quadrant */,
  "quad_name" TEXT /* Name of the breast quadrant */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the breast quadrant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quad_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "irradiation" (
  "irradiat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each irradiation treatment status */,
  "irradiat_name" TEXT /* Name of the irradiation treatment status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the irradiation treatment status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("irradiat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outcome_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the outcome class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the outcome class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment */,
  "treatment_name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the treatment */,
  "treatment_type" TEXT /* Type of treatment (e.g., chemotherapy, surgery) */,
  "treatment_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the treatment */,
  "treatment_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the treatment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the patients table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "study_description" TEXT /* Description of the study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_studies" (
  "patient_study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient-study relationship */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the patients table */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the research_studies table */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the patient enrolled in the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_studies_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES research_studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_studies_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_management" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, clinician, administrator) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role-permission relationship */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user_roles table */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user_permissions table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES user_permissions ("permission_id")
)
